name: Tangling Webs
description:
Hurl webs to ensnare your foes, reducing the Movement Speed of enemies in the area by 50% and dealing 1742 Physical Damage. After 10 seconds the webs explode, dealing 2323 Poison Damage to enemies within.

A ranged ally can activate the Arachnophobia synergy on an affected enemy, dealing 2249 Poison Damage to them, fearing them for 4 seconds, and summoning a spider to attack for 10 seconds. The spider bites enemies for 673 Physical Damage.
